name: auth_login_malformed_number_primitive
_note: Top-level JSON primitive. Node's Express strict body-parser accepts only objects/arrays, so it rejects this BEFORE the request-id middleware -> 400 with request_id:'' (empty); Go decodes 12345 into the login struct -> json type error -> 400 with a real request_id. status_only pins the agreed 400 without asserting the request_id-presence divergence (same root as #57). See #33.
